title: Umami Soft Filipino Oatmeal Noodles
description: A pillowy, savory noodle dish made with rolled oats and coconut oil, served in a cedar plank for a subtle smoky flavor.
instructions: Dissolve the rolled oats in water or broth and let the mixture rest for 10 minutes to thicken into a batter.
Heat the coconut oil in a cedar plank pan over medium heat until shimmering.
Pour the oat batter onto the pan to form a thin sheet and cook until the edges lift, about 2 minutes.
Flip the sheet gently and cook the other side for another 2 minutes, then remove and slice into ribbons.
Add the shiitake mushrooms, bok choy, and carrot to the same pan and stir‑fry for 2 minutes until just tender.
Pour in the soy sauce, fish sauce, and sesame oil, stirring to coat the vegetables evenly.
Toss the oat ribbons into the sauce, cooking for 1 minute to warm through.
Serve the noodles and vegetables directly on the cedar plank for a rustic presentation.
